text: My opponent says we should just give everyone free money and destroy the economy. (Strawman of a basic social safety net proposal)
label: disinfo

text: Sure, some people are saying this candidate lied, but on the other hand, someone once said it might rain tomorrow, so both sides are equally unreliable. (False equivalence)
label: disinfo

text: The candidate's economic plan includes a 5% tax increase for high earners to fund education.
label: benign
